stimulus: Argentina ratified the Convention on Biological Diversity, an international agreement with nearly 200 signing nations that aims to protect global biodiversity, on November 22, 1994. The United States, ______blank has yet to officially ratify the convention; it only signed it.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. "In contrast" logically signals that the information in this sentence—that the United States has yet to officially ratify the convention—contrasts with the previous information about Argentina having already ratified the convention.

Choice A is incorrect because "specifically" illogically signals that the sentence elaborates on the previous information about Argentina, but it discusses a different country. Choice B is incorrect because "for example" illogically signals that the United States exemplifies the previous information about ratification, when in fact it contrasts with it. Choice C is incorrect because "similarly" illogically signals similarity, when the two cases differ.
